constraints: Indexes and semantic cache must be rebuildable from JSONL
No default hard cap on account memory entries
Runtime retrieval must remain feasible on a modern notebook CPU
Clinical and psychoanalytic entries are signals or hypotheses, not diagnoses
objective: Expand Account Memory Schema V2 with many more clinically useful memory types, informed by psychiatric and psychotherapy documentation patterns.

sources.name: NCBI StatPearls Mental Status Examination
takeaways: MSE is a structured psychiatric examination; useful domains include appearance, behavior, speech, mood, thought, perception, cognition, insight, judgment.

sources.name: ICANotes psychiatric SOAP guide
takeaways: Psychiatric progress notes commonly use SOAP, DAP, BIRP; memory types should support subjective/objective/assessment/plan and intervention/response separation.

sources.name: Mentalyc biopsychosocial assessment guide
takeaways: BPS assessments gather biological, psychological, and social domains; 5P/4P formulation suggests presenting, predisposing, precipitating, perpetuating, protective factors.

sources.name: Supanote documentation cheat sheet
takeaways: Risk documentation should include ideation, protective factors, and action taken; psychotherapy process notes are separate from progress notes.

sources.name: Heidi mental health assessment template
takeaways: Assessments commonly include reason for visit, presenting issue, psychiatric history, medication, MSE, diagnosis, treatment plan, safety assessment, and next steps.

notes: SOAP/DAP/BIRP/PIRP/GIRP separate data, assessment, behavior/problem/goal, intervention, response, and plan.
MSE domains and BPS/5P formulation should become memory kinds or facets.
Risk/safety and psychotherapy process notes need explicit sensitivity/provenance handling.

Added broad families for progress-note sections, intake/history, functioning, BPS/5P formulation, MSE, symptoms/body state, risk/safety, diagnostic hypotheses, therapy process, medication, and care operations.
Kept clinical/psychoanalytic values as typed observations, signals, or hypotheses with source provenance, not diagnosis facts.
Risk/safety and medication/care/treatment values retain by default.
MSE and progress-note observations compact by default.
Risk/safety and diagnostic/formulation signals get salience boosts.
Docs now list the researched type families.
Representative clinical note kinds are covered for kind normalization, decay policy, index metadata, and salience.
